entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Public barrel entry point for the @rtcforge/core package, re-exporting shared primitives: EventEmitter, errors, logging/metrics, HashRing, Clock, IdGenerator, StateStore, MessageBus, Lock, Membership, and Gossip.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Public barrel entry point for the @rtcforge/sdk client package, re-exporting RTCForgeClient, Room, transports, reconnect/backoff strategies, message queues, and client/room/transport types.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Public entry point for @rtcforge/adapter-udp, re-exporting UdpGossipTransport and its options type.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Full public entry point for @rtcforge/media, re-exporting the complete media surface including Call, capture helpers, PeerConnection, MediaService, MediaRouter, Producer/Consumer, and WorkerPool.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Public entry point for @rtcforge/sfu, re-exporting the cascading SFU surface — SfuNode, SfuCluster, CascadingRouter, cascade tree planning, placement strategies, bandwidth estimation, and failure tracking.

config.name: scan-result.json
config.summary: Generated project-scan inventory used by the Understand-Anything pipeline, listing all files, detected languages, frameworks, the import map, and complexity estimates.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Root npm workspaces manifest for the RTCForge monorepo, wiring shared dev tooling (tsup, vitest, ESLint), workspace packages, and lint-staged/husky configuration.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/adapter-udp, a UDP gossip transport adapter providing a connectionless wire for the core gossip membership layer.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the adapter-udp package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to the package source.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/core, the shared primitives package providing EventEmitter, Logger, hashing, and other building blocks for the other packages.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the core package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/media, the WebRTC media package handling peer connections, media capture, and call management, with separate browser and Node entry points.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the media package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/sdk, the browser and Node.js client SDK exposing RTCForgeClient, with optional and runtime dependencies on the other RTCForge packages.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the sdk package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/sfu, the cascading SFU cluster package providing multi-node routing, load balancing, and bandwidth estimation.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the sfu package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/signaling, declaring the dual CJS/ESM build entry points, public publish access, and runtime dependencies on @rtcforge/core, the ws WebSocket library, and zod for validation.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the @rtcforge/signaling package, extending the shared monorepo base config and scoping compilation to the src directory.

file:packages/adapter-udp/src/UdpGossipT.name: UdpGossipTransport.ts
file:packages/adapter-udp/src/UdpGossipT.summary: Node.js UDP datagram implementation of @rtcforge/core's GossipTransport, used to exchange cluster membership gossip between SFU nodes over the network.

file:packages/core/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/core/src/index.ts.summary: Public barrel entry point for the @rtcforge/core package, re-exporting shared primitives: EventEmitter, errors, logging/metrics, HashRing, Clock, IdGenerator, StateStore, MessageBus, Lock, Membership, and Gossip.

file:packages/media/src/ActiveSpeakerDet.name: ActiveSpeakerDetector.ts
file:packages/media/src/ActiveSpeakerDet.summary: Polls WebRTC getStats audio levels across peer connections on an interval to determine the currently active speaker and notifies via an onChange callback.

file:packages/media/src/Call.ts.name: Call.ts
file:packages/media/src/Call.ts.summary: Client-side mesh call orchestrator: manages one PeerConnection per remote peer in a Room, wiring perfect-negotiation signaling, track add/replace/remove, mute controls, and active-speaker detection.

file:packages/media/src/Consumer.ts.name: Consumer.ts
file:packages/media/src/Consumer.ts.summary: Server-side SFU consumer wrapper extending MediaEntity, representing a downstream media consumer bound to an upstream producer.

file:packages/media/src/LocalTrackRegist.name: LocalTrackRegistry.ts
file:packages/media/src/LocalTrackRegist.summary: Tracks the set of local MediaStreamTracks a Call is publishing, supporting add/remove/replace and per-kind enable (mute) toggling.

file:packages/media/src/MediaEntity.ts.name: MediaEntity.ts
file:packages/media/src/MediaEntity.ts.summary: Defines the abstract MediaEntity base class and MediaEntityHandle interface shared by server-side Producer and Consumer, providing pause/resume/close lifecycle and transport-close handling.

file:packages/media/src/MediaRouter.ts.name: MediaRouter.ts
file:packages/media/src/MediaRouter.ts.summary: Wraps a mediasoup Router to manage WebRTC and pipe transports, producers and consumers for one room, including cross-router piping of producers for cascading/scale-out.

file:packages/media/src/MediaService.ts.name: MediaService.ts
file:packages/media/src/MediaService.ts.summary: Top-level SFU media service that owns a WorkerPool and lazily creates one MediaRouter per signaling Room, handling peer-left transport cleanup and room-closed teardown.

file:packages/media/src/PeerConnection.t.name: PeerConnection.ts
file:packages/media/src/PeerConnection.t.summary: Thin EventEmitter wrapper around a native RTCPeerConnection implementing perfect negotiation, ICE candidate buffering, simulcast transceivers, codec preference, and stats.

file:packages/media/src/Producer.ts.name: Producer.ts
file:packages/media/src/Producer.ts.summary: Server-side SFU producer wrapper extending MediaEntity, representing an upstream media producer bound to a transport.

file:packages/media/src/WorkerPool.ts.name: WorkerPool.ts
file:packages/media/src/WorkerPool.ts.summary: Manages a pool of mediasoup workers, spawning one per CPU and assigning new routers to the least-loaded worker, with auto-respawn on worker death.

file:packages/media/src/protocol.ts.name: protocol.ts
file:packages/media/src/protocol.ts.summary: Defines the SFU media signaling wire protocol: SignalKind/SignalType enums, a Zod MediaSignalSchema, and the isMediaSignal type guard for validating inbound signals.

file:packages/media/src/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:packages/media/src/types.ts.summary: Shared type definitions and constants for the media package: room/media/connection event enums, default mediasoup codecs, default listen infos, and a TURN-config-to-ICE-server helper.

file:packages/sdk/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/index.ts.summary: Public barrel entry point for the @rtcforge/sdk client package, re-exporting RTCForgeClient, Room, transports, reconnect/backoff strategies, message queues, and client/room/transport types.

file:packages/sfu/src/SimpleBandwidthEst.name: SimpleBandwidthEstimator.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/SimpleBandwidthEst.summary: Heuristic bandwidth/quality estimator for the SFU that maps observed network stats to a recommended simulcast quality layer using directional streak hysteresis.

file:packages/sfu/src/errors.ts.name: errors.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/errors.ts.summary: Defines SFU-specific error types, notably NoAvailableNodeError thrown when no cluster node can accept a placement.

file:packages/sfu/src/CascadeBridge.ts.name: CascadeBridge.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/CascadeBridge.ts.summary: Wires a CascadeTree's link lifecycle events to a media plane, piping and unpiping inter-node cascade links as the tree is rebuilt or torn down.

file:packages/sfu/src/CascadeTree.ts.name: CascadeTree.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/CascadeTree.ts.summary: Plans and maintains a hierarchical fan-out tree of SFU nodes for large broadcast rooms, recomputing the relay topology when nodes fail and emitting link/leaf diff events.

file:packages/sfu/src/CascadingRouter.ts.name: CascadingRouter.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/CascadingRouter.ts.summary: Routes rooms to primary SFU nodes and manages cascade links between nodes, re-assigning rooms and pruning cascade links when a node fails.

file:packages/sfu/src/HealthChecker.ts.name: HealthChecker.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/HealthChecker.ts.summary: Periodically probes registered SFU nodes via an injected check callback, deduplicating in-flight checks and reporting healthy/unhealthy results back to the cluster.

file:packages/sfu/src/NodeFailureTracker.name: NodeFailureTracker.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/NodeFailureTracker.summary: Observes cluster membership and per-node failed/recovered events to fire a single de-duplicated node-gone callback, shared by the cascade router and tree for failure-driven rebuilds.

file:packages/sfu/src/PlacementStrategy..name: PlacementStrategy.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/PlacementStrategy..summary: Pluggable node-placement strategies for the SFU cluster: a least-loaded selector and a consistent-hash-ring selector, both with optional regional pooling.

file:packages/sfu/src/SfuBridge.ts.name: SfuBridge.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/SfuBridge.ts.summary: Connects a CascadingRouter's room-assignment and cascade events to a media interface, adding and removing media routes as rooms are assigned, detached, or cascaded.

file:packages/sfu/src/SfuCluster.ts.name: SfuCluster.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/SfuCluster.ts.summary: Central registry of SFU nodes that adds/removes nodes, selects placement via a strategy, runs health checks, and triggers rebalancing on node failure or overload.

file:packages/sfu/src/SfuNode.ts.name: SfuNode.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/SfuNode.ts.summary: Represents a single SFU node, tracking its load, capacity, failure/drain state and assigned rooms, and emitting load, overloaded, failed, recovered, and bandwidth-quality events.

file:packages/sfu/src/StatsCollector.ts.name: StatsCollector.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/StatsCollector.ts.summary: Periodically samples a node's network stats and feeds them to a bandwidth estimator, reporting the derived quality via a callback.

file:packages/sfu/src/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/types.ts.summary: Shared type and event-constant definitions for the SFU package: node/cluster/router/tree event enums, placement and media interfaces, options, and re-exported core types.

file:packages/signaling/src/Authenticato.name: Authenticator.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/Authenticato.summary: Resolves and validates an incoming WebSocket connection's auth payload, supporting both a pluggable async auth function (token-based) and query-string credentials, returning a normalized AuthPayload or a close reason.

file:packages/signaling/src/HeartbeatMon.name: HeartbeatMonitor.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/HeartbeatMon.summary: Periodic timer that pings every peer across all rooms and disconnects peers that have missed their liveness deadline, keeping the connection pool free of dead sockets.

file:packages/signaling/src/Peer.ts.name: Peer.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/Peer.ts.summary: Represents a single connected client over a WebSocket, parsing and validating inbound messages, emitting typed signal/broadcast/pong events, and enforcing per-peer rate limiting.

file:packages/signaling/src/RateLimiter..name: RateLimiter.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/RateLimiter..summary: Lightweight sliding-window rate limiter tracking hit timestamps to allow or reject actions within a configured window and limit.

file:packages/signaling/src/Room.ts.name: Room.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/Room.ts.summary: Core room aggregate managing peer membership, message relay/broadcast, role and metadata tracking, lifecycle state transitions, and idle/duration timeout enforcement.

file:packages/signaling/src/RoomRegistry.name: RoomRegistry.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/RoomRegistry.summary: In-memory registry of active rooms providing get-or-create, lifecycle event re-emission, empty-room rollback, and bulk disconnect for graceful shutdown.

file:packages/signaling/src/RoomRouter.t.name: RoomRouter.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/RoomRouter.t.summary: Consistent-hash router that maps room IDs to owning nodes via a weighted HashRing, kept current by a membership reconciler, enabling multi-node scale-out of signaling.

file:packages/signaling/src/SignalingSer.name: SignalingServer.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/SignalingSer.summary: Top-level WebSocket signaling server that wires together the authenticator, room registry, heartbeat monitor, and optional cluster router, handling connection lifecycle, redirects, health endpoint, metrics, and audit logging.

file:packages/signaling/src/protocol.ts.name: protocol.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/protocol.ts.summary: Defines the wire protocol for client/server signaling messages, including the MessageType enum and Zod schemas (ClientMessageSchema, ServerMessageSchema) used to validate inbound and outbound frames.

file:packages/signaling/src/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/types.ts.summary: Shared type and constant definitions for the signaling package — auth payload schema, room/peer/server event and state enums, close codes/reasons — and re-exports of core logger/metrics/membership primitives.

file:packages/sdk/src/JoinHandshake.ts.name: JoinHandshake.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/JoinHandshake.ts.summary: Drives the one-shot connect-and-join handshake: connects the transport, waits for the server's joined message (or a timeout), and resolves or rejects accordingly.

file:packages/sdk/src/RTCForgeClient.ts.name: RTCForgeClient.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/RTCForgeClient.ts.summary: Top-level SDK client developers instantiate to connect to an RTCForge signaling server, join a room, manage connection-state transitions, and leave cleanly.

file:packages/sdk/src/ReconnectStrategy..name: ReconnectStrategy.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/ReconnectStrategy..summary: Encapsulates exponential-backoff-with-jitter reconnect timing and attempt accounting used by the WebSocket transport.

file:packages/sdk/src/Room.ts.name: Room.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/Room.ts.summary: Client-side view of a joined room: tracks peers, roles, and metadata, emits peer/media events, sends and broadcasts signaling messages, and binds an optional media Call.

file:packages/sdk/src/SendQueue.ts.name: SendQueue.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/SendQueue.ts.summary: Small FIFO buffer holding outbound messages while the socket is offline, drained in order once the connection is open.

file:packages/sdk/src/Transport.ts.name: Transport.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/Transport.ts.summary: Defines the Transport interface and its typed event map (open/close/message/error/reconnecting) that any signaling transport implementation must satisfy.

file:packages/sdk/src/WebSocketTransport.name: WebSocketTransport.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/WebSocketTransport.summary: WebSocket implementation of the Transport interface with automatic reconnection, token refresh, ping/pong handling, message validation, and an offline send queue.

file:packages/sdk/src/protocol.ts.name: protocol.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/protocol.ts.summary: Wire-protocol definitions: the MessageType enum plus Zod schemas validating server and client signaling messages.

file:packages/sdk/src/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:packages/sdk/src/types.ts.summary: Public SDK type surface: Logger, ConnectionState, event-name enums (Room/Client/Transport), and close code/reason constants shared across the package.

file:packages/core/src/Clock.ts.name: Clock.ts
file:packages/core/src/Clock.ts.summary: Defines the Clock abstraction used throughout @rtcforge/core for time and timer access, providing the real systemClock and a deterministic ManualClock for testing time-dependent logic.

file:packages/core/src/Gossip.ts.name: Gossip.ts
file:packages/core/src/Gossip.ts.summary: Implements an epidemic gossip-based cluster membership protocol with incarnation numbers, alive/dead/tombstone lifecycle, and a fanout-limited transport, enabling multi-node RTCForge deployments to discover and track peers without a central registry.

file:packages/core/src/Lock.ts.name: Lock.ts
file:packages/core/src/Lock.ts.summary: Defines the distributed Lock interface for TTL-based leader/resource coordination, with a noopLock for single-node mode and an in-memory MemoryLock for local development and tests.

file:packages/core/src/Membership.ts.name: Membership.ts
file:packages/core/src/Membership.ts.summary: Defines the NodeInfo and Membership interfaces for cluster node registration and discovery, plus MemoryMembership, a TTL-pruned in-memory roster with watch notifications.

file:packages/core/src/MembershipReconci.name: MembershipReconciler.ts
file:packages/core/src/MembershipReconci.summary: Diffs successive Membership snapshots and fires onAdd/onRemove/onUpdate handlers, letting consumers react incrementally to nodes joining and leaving the cluster.

file:packages/core/src/StateStore.ts.name: StateStore.ts
file:packages/core/src/StateStore.ts.summary: Defines the StateStore key-value interface with optional TTL and prefix scans, plus MemoryStateStore, a process-local implementation used as the default backing store for shared session state.

file:.husky/pre-commit.name: pre-commit
file:.husky/pre-commit.summary: Husky Git pre-commit hook that runs lint-staged before each commit to lint and format staged files.

file:.understand-anything/.understandign.name: .understandignore
file:.understand-anything/.understandign.summary: Ignore-list controlling which files the Understand-Anything analysis tool excludes when scanning the repository.

config:.understand-anything/intermediate.name: scan-result.json
config:.understand-anything/intermediate.summary: Generated project-scan inventory used by the Understand-Anything pipeline, listing all files, detected languages, frameworks, the import map, and complexity estimates.

config:package.json.name: package.json
config:package.json.summary: Root npm workspaces manifest for the RTCForge monorepo, wiring shared dev tooling (tsup, vitest, ESLint), workspace packages, and lint-staged/husky configuration.

config:packages/adapter-udp/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/adapter-udp/package.json.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/adapter-udp, a UDP gossip transport adapter providing a connectionless wire for the core gossip membership layer.

file:packages/adapter-udp/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/adapter-udp/src/index.ts.summary: Public entry point for @rtcforge/adapter-udp, re-exporting UdpGossipTransport and its options type.

config:packages/adapter-udp/tsconfig.jso.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/adapter-udp/tsconfig.jso.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the adapter-udp package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to the package source.

config:packages/core/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/core/package.json.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/core, the shared primitives package providing EventEmitter, Logger, hashing, and other building blocks for the other packages.

file:packages/core/src/errors.ts.name: errors.ts
file:packages/core/src/errors.ts.summary: Defines the RtcForge error hierarchy (RtcForgeError, InvalidArgumentError) and the isRtcForgeError type guard used across packages for consistent error handling.

file:packages/core/src/EventEmitter.ts.name: EventEmitter.ts
file:packages/core/src/EventEmitter.ts.summary: Lightweight, dependency-free typed EventEmitter used throughout RTCForge for on/once/off/emit pub-sub event handling.

file:packages/core/src/HashRing.ts.name: HashRing.ts
file:packages/core/src/HashRing.ts.summary: Weighted rendezvous (highest-random-weight) hash ring used to map keys to cluster nodes for consistent, weight-aware node selection in scale-out scenarios.

file:packages/core/src/IdGenerator.ts.name: IdGenerator.ts
file:packages/core/src/IdGenerator.ts.summary: Provides ID generation helpers: randomId for opaque random identifiers and SequentialId for monotonically increasing counters.

file:packages/core/src/MessageBus.ts.name: MessageBus.ts
file:packages/core/src/MessageBus.ts.summary: In-process LocalMessageBus implementing topic-based publish/subscribe, the default single-node messaging backend before plugging in a distributed bus.

file:packages/core/src/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:packages/core/src/types.ts.summary: Shared core type definitions and no-op defaults — Logger/Metrics interfaces, noopLogger, noopMetrics, the Metric helper, and the toError coercion utility.

config:packages/core/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/core/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the core package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config:packages/media/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/media/package.json.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/media, the WebRTC media package handling peer connections, media capture, and call management, with separate browser and Node entry points.

file:packages/media/src/browser.ts.name: browser.ts
file:packages/media/src/browser.ts.summary: Browser-targeted public entry point for @rtcforge/media, re-exporting only the client-safe surface (Call, media capture helpers, PeerConnection, signal types) without the Node/SFU server pieces.

file:packages/media/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/media/src/index.ts.summary: Full public entry point for @rtcforge/media, re-exporting the complete media surface including Call, capture helpers, PeerConnection, MediaService, MediaRouter, Producer/Consumer, and WorkerPool.

file:packages/media/src/MediaManager.ts.name: MediaManager.ts
file:packages/media/src/MediaManager.ts.summary: Browser media-capture helpers wrapping navigator.mediaDevices — getUserMedia/getDisplayMedia, device enumeration and filtering, device-change subscription, and permission checks.

config:packages/media/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/media/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the media package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config:packages/sdk/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/sdk/package.json.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/sdk, the browser and Node.js client SDK exposing RTCForgeClient, with optional and runtime dependencies on the other RTCForge packages.

config:packages/sdk/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/sdk/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the sdk package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config:packages/sfu/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/sfu/package.json.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/sfu, the cascading SFU cluster package providing multi-node routing, load balancing, and bandwidth estimation.

file:packages/sfu/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/sfu/src/index.ts.summary: Public entry point for @rtcforge/sfu, re-exporting the cascading SFU surface — SfuNode, SfuCluster, CascadingRouter, cascade tree planning, placement strategies, bandwidth estimation, and failure tracking.

config:packages/sfu/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/sfu/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the sfu package, extending the shared base config and scoping compilation to its source.

config:packages/signaling/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/signaling/package.json.summary: Package manifest for @rtcforge/signaling, declaring the dual CJS/ESM build entry points, public publish access, and runtime dependencies on @rtcforge/core, the ws WebSocket library, and zod for validation.

file:packages/signaling/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/signaling/src/index.ts.summary: Public entry point (barrel) for the @rtcforge/signaling package, re-exporting SignalingServer, Room, Peer, RoomRouter, the wire protocol types, and supporting event/auth/metrics types that consumers use to stand up a WebRTC signaling server.

config:packages/signaling/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/signaling/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the @rtcforge/signaling package, extending the shared monorepo base config and scoping compilation to the src directory.
